final_response: Staged at tmp/prompt-cache-attack-paper/tldr.md (since you only have the TLDR, not the paper) and logged a followup to pull the PDF by 2026-05-22 — once you've skimmed it, promote to projects/ or move into resources/.

actions.purpose: stage the TLDR with provenance and a 'not the paper itself' warning
log a 2026-05-22 expected-by reminder to pull the PDF before the topic comes up next week
open today's daybook with Intent/Log/Handoff/Guardrails covering the routing decision and its rationale

notes: Routed to tmp/ rather than projects/ or resources/ because only a research-assistant TLDR is in hand, not the paper. tmp/ is the documented staging ground for 'might become a project'.

Did not create a decisions.md entry — no commitment that constrains future action. Did not create an observations.md entry — single inbound TLDR is not a pattern. Both bars are deliberately strict per workspace conventions.
Followup is the load-bearing piece: tmp/ is gitignored, so without the followups.md entry the staged TLDR would silently rot.
Added a 'do NOT cite TLDR numbers as verified' guardrail in the daybook handoff so a cold-pickup session doesn't quote the 73% figure as fact before the PDF is actually pulled.
Subfolder created under tmp/ (kebab-case, mirroring projects/ shape) so promotion later is a simple mv.
